overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City. The player navigates from a covered sidewalk across a neon-lit intersection, through a narrow alley featuring Tom's Diner, and continues along a street beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by holographic advertisements and futuristic cyberpunk architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk toward the intersection, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete and metal structure spanning across the street above
vertical red neon sign on building facade
red neon signage with Japanese characters
yellow zebra crossing stripes on the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated structure, approaching a brightly lit intersection. Neon signs for Mishima Studios and Akihabara illuminate the scene while the camera moves steadily forward toward the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian scramble crossing

events.description: exits covered walkway into open intersection with multi-story buildings
pedestrian signal changes to green walk symbol, crowd begins crossing
completes crossing and turns toward alley entrance

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the intersection with a crowd of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: car waiting at the red light at the intersection

entered.detail: teal-lit multi-level parking garage with open concrete levels
large floating holographic advertisement displaying a face

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a teal-lit parking garage and massive holographic billboards. The camera waits for the walk signal, then crosses the street among a dense crowd of pedestrians, moving from the sheltered walkway into the exposed intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza transitioning to alley entrance

events.description: completes street crossing and enters pedestrian plaza area
approaches narrow alley entrance with Tom's Diner sign visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the pedestrian plaza toward the alley entrance, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in white pants walking ahead toward the alley

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading MARKET above storefront
narrow opening between buildings leading to darker passage
scattered papers and garbage on the tiled ground

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera moves through a tiled pedestrian plaza littered with trash and debris. The environment transitions from the open street to a narrower alley entrance, with a glowing Market sign visible ahead and the Tom's Diner neon sign becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban alley with neon signage

events.description: enters darker alley with green ambient lighting and red neon signs

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway, passing trash cans and vending machines

entered.detail: large circular red neon sign with Tom's Diner text and burger graphic
tall concrete walls of adjacent buildings creating narrow passage
tall concrete walls with pipes and industrial details
illuminated beverage vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, enclosed alleyway dominated by the bright red neon glow of Tom's Diner sign. The space is cluttered with trash cans and debris, with tall concrete walls creating a canyon-like effect. Green ambient lighting mixes with the red neon as the camera progresses through the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated highway with commercial storefronts

events.description: exits narrow alley onto street lined with concrete support columns under overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the elevated highway, passing by storefronts and occasional pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above
orange and blue neon sign reading TURBO above storefront
green neon corporate signage for Macroware
red neon sign with Japanese characters reading Fuyutsuki

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley, the camera enters a wide sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, characterized by massive concrete support columns lining the right side. Neon signs for TURBO, Macroware, and Fuyutsuki illuminate the path ahead as the camera continues walking through this covered urban corridor, passing palm trees and various storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered urban walkway through a sprawling neon intersection and into a gritty city alley. It begins beneath an elevated structure, moving along a covered sidewalk illuminated by Mishima Studios and Akihabara neon signs toward a brightly lit crosswalk. As the camera emerges from the shelter, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a teal-lit parking garage and massive holographic billboards, where the camera pauses before weaving through a dense crowd of pedestrians. The perspective then shifts from the exposed street into a tiled pedestrian plaza cluttered with trash and debris. Finally, the environment narrows as the camera moves toward a glowing Market sign and the distant neon lights of Tom's Diner.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a sprawling urban corridor beneath an elevated highway. It begins by pushing through a narrow passage dominated by the intense red glow of Tom's Diner, where green ambient light reflects off concrete walls and scattered debris. As the camera exits the alley, the confined space opens up into a wide sidewalk characterized by massive concrete support columns. The scene then expands further, passing palm trees and storefronts while the lighting shifts to a vibrant array of neon signs for TURBO, Macroware, and Fuyutsuki. Finally, the camera continues its steady forward progression through this covered futuristic thoroughfare.
